passedAssertions.reason: Invalid sheet input with blank OAuth bootstrap stayed in Settings on the Sheet tab, focused settingsSheetId, and showed inline remediation instead of reloading away.
Both the dashboard discovery CTA and Settings → Discovery → Open discovery setup visibly opened the discovery setup wizard on the signed-out dashboard.
After same-session auth preflight succeeded (userinfo 200 and Sheets metadata 200), reloading with the same OAuth client ID preserved signed-in account chrome and write-capable drawer controls.
